service.description: The resource name of the service that this endpoint provides.

endpoint_id.description: The Resource ID must be 1-63 characters long, including digits, lowercase letters or the hyphen character.

address.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the endpoint.

port.description: Port that the endpoint is running on, must be in the range of [0, 65535]. If unspecified, the default is 0.

metadata.description: Metadata for the endpoint. This data can be consumed by service clients. The entire metadata dictionary may contain up to 512 characters, spread across all key-value pairs. Metadata that goes beyond any these limits will be rejected.

network.description: The URL to the network, such as projects/PROJECT_NUMBER/locations/global/networks/NETWORK_NAME.
